B2C REWARD DISTRIBUTION

$EARNM Rewards Create Revenue

Users obtain 'Fractal Box' assets, like Mystery Boxes, for performing online activities. When revealing these assets on-chain, users pay the gas/network fees. Thanks to this strategic design, every user transaction generates profit.
‍

B2C Rewards Utility

User & Staking Rewards

Upgrading NFTs

Empowering Physical EarnPhones

Governance Rewards

BUILT-IN MECHANISMS

Vesting & Distribution, Powered by 'Fractal Box' Protocol

$EARNM's proprietary 'Fractal Box' protocol powers an automated vesting & distribution mechanism — promoting a 12-month holding period for users.

When Mystery Boxes are prematurely opened, their contents are automatically distributed throughout the ecosystem, benefiting all of its participants.

Mystery Boxes not revealed within 60 days of issue are forfeited and distributed amongst the network.

Therefore, regardless of whether a user utilizes their Redemption Code(s) — they still benefit the Ecosystem.
